Internal_Reference.comment: This is the PDS4 logical identifier for the Mars2020 Mission.
This is the PDS4 logical identifier for the Mars 2020 spacecraft.

Observing_System_Component.name: Front Hazard Avoidance Camera Left String A

Internal_Reference.comment: This is the PDS4 logical identifier for the Front Hazard Avoidance Camera Left String A onboard the Mars 2020 spacecraft.
This is the PDS4 logical identifier for the planet - mars.

geom:Geometry_Lander.geom:description: Geometry as reported by the spacecraft in telemetry
Initial state of geometry before onboard updates (e.g. visual odometry)

img:Flat_Field_File.img:description: ECAM flat field from R. Willson, Bayer decoded and converted to VICAR by R. Deen. For color images, bias applied.

Internal_Reference.comment: This is the PDS4 logical identifier for an input product.

proc:Process.proc:process_owner_institution_name: MULTIMISSION INSTRUMENT PROCESSING LAB, JET PROPULSION LAB

proc:Software_Program.proc:name: M2020EDRGEN
proc:Software_Program.proc:description: CODMAC LEVEL 1 TO LEVEL 2 CONVERSION VIA JPL/MIPL M2020EDRGEN
